title: viola scanica
intro: Viola scanica, also known as the Swedish violet or common dog violet, is a species of flowering plant in the violet family. This perennial plant is native to Europe and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Viola scanica include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation, and alleviating symptoms of insomnia, as well as soothing skin irritations and wounds. Herbal preparations of Viola scanica include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
